executives.name: Robert K. "Kelly" Ortberg
executives.background: Mr. Ortberg became President and Chief Executive Officer of Boeing in August 2024. He previously served as CEO of Rockwell Collins and later as CEO of Collins Aerospace after its acquisition by United Technologies.

executives.name: Brian J. West
executives.background: Mr. West has served as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer since August 2021. Prior to joining Boeing, he was CFO of Refinitiv and Oscar Health.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Stephanie Pope
executives.background: Ms. Pope is Executive Vice President and President and CEO of Boeing Commercial Airplanes. She previously served as Boeing's Chief Operating Officer and CEO of Boeing Global Services.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and President and CEO, Boeing Commercial Airplanes
Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer

executives.name: Theodore "Ted" Colbert III
executives.background: Mr. Colbert was Executive Vice President and President and CEO of Boeing Defense, Space & Security. He previously served as CEO of Boeing Global Services and Chief Information Officer.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and President and CEO, Boeing Defense, Space & Security

executives.name: Christopher Raymond
executives.background: Mr. Raymond is President and CEO of Boeing Global Services. He previously served as Boeing's Chief Sustainability Officer.

tenure_dates.title: President and CEO, Boeing Global Services

board_of_directors.name: Steven M. Mollenkopf
board_of_directors.background: Independent Chair of the Board. Former CEO of Qualcomm Incorporated. He has extensive experience in engineering and technology leadership.

board_of_directors.name: Robert K. "Kelly" Ortberg
board_of_directors.background: President and CEO of Boeing. Former CEO of Rockwell Collins.

board_of_directors.name: David L. Gitlin
board_of_directors.background: Chairman and CEO of Carrier Global Corporation. Former President of Collins Aerospace.

board_of_directors.name: Lynn J. Good
board_of_directors.background: Chair, President and CEO of Duke Energy Corporation. Former CFO of Duke Energy.

board_of_directors.name: Stayce D. Harris
board_of_directors.background: Retired Lieutenant General of the U.S. Air Force. Former Inspector General of the Air Force.

board_of_directors.name: Akhil Johri
board_of_directors.background: Former Executive Vice President and CFO of United Technologies Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: David A. Muilenburg
board_of_directors.background: Former CEO of Boeing. Note: This entry is for historical context as he is no longer on the board.

board_of_directors.name: Sabrina Soussan
board_of_directors.background: Chairman and CEO of Suez SA. Former CEO of Swisslog and Co-CEO of Siemens Mobility.

sources.source_description: Boeing Press Release: Kelly Ortberg Begins Role as CEO
